message:
test(align): add 12 edge-case tests for Align widget (bd-2gp78)

Cover odd-remainder centering, partial dimension specification,
exact-fit alignment, 1x1 in large area, clone/copy/debug traits,
and stateful widget zero-area/zero-child noop paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
